function.name: create_skill
function.description: Create a custom persona skill file in the user's persona library. The persona becomes selectable from Settings after creation. Use this after collecting user preferences to generate a tailored SKILL.md.

name.description: Skill directory name, e.g. 'persona_alex'. Must start with 'persona_' and contain only lowercase letters, digits, and underscores.

content.description: Full SKILL.md content including the YAML frontmatter block (--- name, description, compatibility ---) followed by the persona system prompt.
